_comment: Evo-Lite MCP Server — Claude Code configuration sample.
_usage: Copy the mcpServers block into .claude/settings.json in your project root.
_note: cwd must point to the project root where .evo-lite/ exists. The server runs over stdio; no network socket is opened.
_tools: evo_recall            — search memory archive (param: query, k)
evo_plan_status       — planning IR: specs, plans, task progress
evo_architecture_status — architecture IR: modules, file counts
evo_drift_status      — live drift scan (arch + planning findings)
